meta.title: Gallery — Aletheia Resource Center
meta.description: A visual tour of life at Aletheia Resource Center — classrooms, co-curricular activities, events, and the people who make our community.

hero.titleHtml: A Window into Our World
hero.subtitle: Explore the vibrant life at Aletheia Resource Center — from the energy of our classrooms and sports fields to the warmth of community events and our world-class facilities.
